name: logistics dispatchers managing 5–15 vehicles tool
description: For logistics dispatchers managing 5–15 vehicles, inefficient route planning causes increased fuel costs and delayed deliveries. We provide fleet optimization software instead of manual route planning and performance tracking.
problem_solved: Inefficient route planning leading to increased fuel costs and delayed deliveries.
